name: python3-ntc-templates
title: python3-ntc-templates
summary: TextFSM Templates for Network Devices, and wrapper for TextFSM's CliTable
description:
TextFSM Templates for Network Devices, and wrapper for TextFSM's CliTable
This package contains TextFSM Templates for Network Devices, and a Python
wrapper for TextFSM's CliTable. TextFSM helps make parsing cli commands more
manageable.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ntc-templates because TextFSM Templates for Network Devices, and wrapper for TextFSM's CliTable.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ntc-templates as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ntc-templates with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ntc-templates --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
